summary: Completed testing of BLOCK 169 (Duplicate Detection Prompt feature). Backend check-ownership endpoint and AddRecordPage duplicate detection flow work correctly. Dream List correctly bypasses duplicate check. Global Search component has duplicate detection code but the search modal/panel doesn't appear to be accessible from the main UI navigation.

integration_issues.issue: GlobalSearch component has duplicate detection implemented in code (lines 177-213 in GlobalSearch.js), but the Global Search modal doesn't appear to be triggered by clicking the search icon in navbar. The search icon redirects to Nectar/Explore page instead.
integration_issues.note: Code review shows GlobalSearch.js is not imported/used anywhere else in the codebase

action_items: Verify if GlobalSearch modal is intended to be accessible from UI and integrate if needed
critical_code_review_comments: DuplicateConfirmationModal.js: Well structured, correct data-testid attributes (duplicate-detection-modal, duplicate-confirm-btn, duplicate-cancel-btn)
AddRecordPage.js: Duplicate detection implemented correctly at lines 180-198, checks ownership before adding
GlobalSearch.js: Has duplicate detection at lines 177-213 but component not visibly integrated in navigation
VariantActions.js: Duplicate detection implemented at lines 49-72
VariantCompletion.js: Duplicate detection implemented at lines 176-243
Backend collection.py: check_record_ownership endpoint correctly returns copy_count at lines 98-120
seed_data_creation: Temporarily created duplicate Igor record (discogs_id 14215683) with instance_id to verify duplicate flow, then deleted it
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 169 duplicate detection tested. AddRecordPage works correctly: owned record triggers modal, 'Yes, Add Another' adds with instance_id, 'No, Cancel' returns to form. Dream List (mode=dreaming) correctly bypasses duplicate check. Backend check-ownership returns copy_count. GlobalSearch.js has duplicate detection code but the component doesn't appear to be rendered in main UI (search icon leads to Nectar explore page). VariantActions and VariantCompletion also have duplicate detection per code review but not explicitly UI-tested (code looks correct).

backend_check_ownership_copy_count.details: GET /api/records/check-ownership returns in_collection, record_id, and copy_count fields

add_record_page_duplicate_modal.details: Selecting owned record and clicking 'Confirm to Collection' triggers duplicate detection modal

add_record_yes_add_another.details: Clicking 'Yes, Add Another' adds record with new instance_id (timestamp), redirects to collection

add_record_no_cancel.details: Clicking 'No, Cancel' closes modal and returns to form with record still selected

duplicate_modal_data_testid.details: Modal has data-testid='duplicate-detection-modal', buttons have duplicate-confirm-btn and duplicate-cancel-btn

duplicate_modal_content.details: Modal shows 'Duplicate Detected' header and displays copy count ('a copy' or 'X copies')

dream_list_no_duplicate_check.details: Adding to Dream List (mode=dreaming) does NOT trigger duplicate detection - directly adds to wishlist

global_search_duplicate_detection.details: GlobalSearch component has duplicate detection code but modal not accessible from UI navigation

variant_actions_duplicate_detection.details: VariantActions.js has duplicate check at lines 49-72, uses same DuplicateConfirmationModal

variant_completion_duplicate_detection.details: VariantCompletion.js has duplicate check at lines 176-243, uses same DuplicateConfirmationModal
